event: US assassinates Iranian General Qasem Soleimani
source_note: Drone strike in Baghdad; Iran vows revenge

event: Natanz nuclear facility sabotage (Israel)
source_note: Explosion at Iran centrifuge facility; Iran blames Israel

event: Russia invades Ukraine — global energy shock
source_note: Brent spikes from $95 to $130 within weeks

event: Biden visits Saudi Arabia — OPEC production talks
source_note: OPEC+ agrees modest output increase

event: OPEC+ surprise cut of 1.16 mb/d
source_note: Brent jumps ~6% day of announcement

event: Hamas attacks Israel — Gaza war begins
source_note: Regional spillover fears; Brent +4% in days after

event: Iran warns of wider conflict if Gaza war continues
source_note: Hezbollah skirmishes on Lebanon border begin

event: US deploys two aircraft carriers to Eastern Mediterranean
source_note: Deterrence signal; risk premium rises

event: Houthis begin attacking commercial ships in Red Sea
source_note: Bab-el-Mandeb shipping disruption begins

event: US and UK strike Houthi targets in Yemen
source_note: Red Sea disruption continues; shipping costs spike

event: Israel strikes Iranian consulate in Damascus
source_note: Kills senior IRGC commanders; major escalation

event: Iran launches 300+ drones and missiles at Israel
source_note: First direct Iran-Israel attack; Brent +3%

event: Israel retaliates with limited strike on Isfahan
source_note: Iran plays down attack; de-escalation signals

event: OPEC+ extends cuts through end of 2025
source_note: Production restraint maintained

event: Hamas political chief Ismail Haniyeh assassinated in Tehran
source_note: Iran blames Israel directly; vows retaliation

event: Hezbollah pager/walkie-talkie attacks (Israel operation)
source_note: Lebanese Hezbollah leadership decimated

event: Hezbollah chief Nasrallah killed by Israel
source_note: Major blow to Iran's proxy network

event: Iran fires 180 ballistic missiles at Israel
source_note: Largest Iranian missile attack on Israel

event: Israel strikes Iranian air defenses and missile facilities
source_note: Israel spares oil/nuclear facilities; prices fall 5%

event: Assad regime under pressure — Syria destabilized
source_note: Axis of resistance weakening

event: Assad regime falls — Syria falls to rebel forces
source_note: Major shift in Middle East balance; Iran loses key ally

event: Trump returns — maximum pressure on Iran reinstated
source_note: Executive orders targeting Iranian oil exports

event: US-Iran nuclear talks begin (indirect)
source_note: Qatar mediating; Israel strongly opposes deal

event: Iran enrichment at 60% confirmed — IAEA report
source_note: Red line discussions in Washington and Tel Aviv

event: Israel strikes Iran nuclear and military facilities
source_note: Kills senior commanders; Brent jumps 7% same day

event: Iran retaliates — missiles target Israeli cities
source_note: Major exchange; Brent reaches low-$80s

event: US-brokered ceasefire announced
source_note: Brent retraces to ~$70; temporary calm

event: Iran resumes uranium enrichment — ceasefire fragile
source_note: Ceasefire holding but tensions remain elevated

event: OPEC+ emergency meeting — output policy review
source_note: Members debate response to price instability

event: US and Israel launch strikes on Iran — war begins
source_note: Strait of Hormuz de facto closure begins; Brent >$100

event: Iran retaliates — strikes across 9 Gulf countries
source_note: Saudi and Qatari facilities targeted; IEA warns largest supply disruption in history

event: IEA emergency meeting — strategic reserves release
source_note: IEA coordinates SPR release to offset supply shock

event: Brent crude peaks above $100/barrel
source_note: J.P. Morgan estimates $7.5 geopolitical risk premium; $100+ if Hormuz blockaded

event: Conflict ongoing — Hormuz partially disrupted
source_note: ~20% of global oil trade at risk; US Navy not yet escorting tankers
